unresolved_questions: BeySat BGAN, BeySat Certus, and BeySat NB are listed in the priority product set but their dedicated pages (satcom-beysat-bgan, satcom-beysat-certus, satcom-beysat-nb) were all skipped (class_budget exhausted).
